title: A Clean Operation at the Sports Network
article_text: I must clean my box of sports equipment before the big match. I tend to organize my tasks carefully because I want a positive result. My goal is to advance my skills and score more points for the team. The star player will fill the blue seat near the network of cameras. Generally, we avoid throwing the ball too quickly during an operation. The normal option is to use a good investment in training. I can see my associate working hard beyond the usual time. We will throw the ball to each other and match our moves. This trip is a great chance to network with other players. I must not forget to seat myself and watch the game carefully.

sentences.en: I must clean my box of sports equipment before the big match.
sentences.zh: 我必须在大型比赛前清理我的运动装备箱。

words.eng_def: to make something free from dirt
a game between two people or teams

sentences.en: I tend to organize my tasks carefully because I want a positive result.
sentences.zh: 我倾向于仔细组织我的任务，因为我想要一个积极的结果。

words.eng_def: to usually do something or be likely to do something
a piece of work that must be done

sentences.en: My goal is to advance my skills and score more points for the team.
sentences.zh: 我的目标是提升我的技能并为团队赢得更多分数。

words.eng_def: to get points in a game or test

sentences.en: The star player will fill the blue seat near the network of cameras.
sentences.zh: 明星球员将坐在靠近摄像机网络的蓝色座位上。

words.eng_def: a very famous or skilled person
to make something full or to take a space
the color of the sky on a clear day
a group of connected things or people

sentences.en: Generally, we avoid throwing the ball too quickly during an operation.
sentences.zh: 通常，我们在操作中避免过快投球。

words.eng_def: to send something through the air with your hand

sentences.en: The normal option is to use a good investment in training.
sentences.zh: 通常的选择是在训练中进行良好的投资。

words.eng_def: a choice; something you can choose
money or effort spent to get a future benefit

sentences.en: I can see my associate working hard beyond the usual time.
sentences.zh: 我能看到我的同事在超出平常时间努力工作。

sentences.en: We will throw the ball to each other and match our moves.
sentences.zh: 我们会互相传球并配合我们的动作。

words.eng_def: to send something through the air with your hand
to be the same or suitable for something

sentences.en: This trip is a great chance to network with other players.
sentences.zh: 这次旅行是与其他球员建立联系的好机会。

words.eng_def: to meet and talk with people for work or business

sentences.en: I must not forget to seat myself and watch the game carefully.
sentences.zh: 我不能忘记坐下并仔细观看比赛。

words.eng_def: to sit down or to put someone in a seat

vocabulary.eng_def: to make something free from dirt
vocabulary.example: I clean my room every morning.

vocabulary.eng_def: to usually do something or be likely to do something
vocabulary.example: I tend to get up early.

vocabulary.eng_def: to move forward or improve
vocabulary.example: She wants to advance her career.

vocabulary.eng_def: to make something full or to take a space
vocabulary.example: Please fill the cup with water.

vocabulary.eng_def: a very famous or skilled person
vocabulary.example: He is a star football player.

vocabulary.eng_def: a group of connected things or people; to meet and talk with people for work
vocabulary.example: I use the network to find a job.

vocabulary.eng_def: in most cases; usually
vocabulary.example: Generally, we eat lunch at noon.

vocabulary.eng_def: a planned activity or process
vocabulary.example: The rescue operation was successful.

vocabulary.eng_def: a game between two people or teams; to be the same or suitable
vocabulary.example: The match starts at 3 o'clock.

vocabulary.eng_def: to stay away from something
vocabulary.example: I avoid eating too much sugar.

vocabulary.eng_def: a place to sit; to sit down or to put someone in a seat
vocabulary.example: Please take a seat.

vocabulary.eng_def: to send something through the air with your hand
vocabulary.example: He can throw the ball very far.

vocabulary.eng_def: a piece of work that must be done
vocabulary.example: My task is to clean the kitchen.

vocabulary.eng_def: usual or typical
vocabulary.example: It is normal to feel tired after work.

vocabulary.eng_def: something you want to achieve
vocabulary.example: My goal is to learn English.

vocabulary.eng_def: a person you work with
vocabulary.example: My associate helped me finish the project.

vocabulary.eng_def: the color of the sky on a clear day
vocabulary.example: She has blue eyes.

vocabulary.eng_def: good or hopeful
vocabulary.example: Stay positive and keep trying.

vocabulary.eng_def: a choice; something you can choose
vocabulary.example: You have two options.

vocabulary.eng_def: a container with flat sides
vocabulary.example: I keep my toys in a box.

quiz.question_en: What is the English word for '避免'?
What is the English word for '目标'?
What is the English word for '网络'?
What is the English word for '蓝色的'?
What is the English word for '任务'?

image_prompts: A person cleaning a box full of sports equipment like a ball and a glove, with a big stadium in the background.
A person sitting at a desk with a checklist, organizing tasks with a smile, feeling positive.
A person practicing basketball, aiming for a hoop with a glowing target symbol above.
A famous basketball player sitting on a blue seat in a stadium, surrounded by cameras on a network.
Two people playing catch in a gym, with a sign saying 'Operation: Practice' on the wall.
A person looking at two signs: one says 'Invest in Training' with a coin, the other says 'Normal Option'.
Two colleagues working late at an office, with a clock showing time beyond usual hours.
Two people throwing a ball to each other in a park, with matching arrows showing their movements.
A group of people at a sports event, shaking hands and exchanging contact information, with a 'Network' banner.
A person sitting on a chair watching a game on a big screen, with a caption 'Remember to seat yourself'.
